rect.style: fill:color-mix(in srgb,var(--beck-primary) 6%,var(--beck-surface));stroke:color-mix(in srgb,var(--beck-primary) 15%,transparent);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--beck-accent) 20%, transparent)) drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgb(0 0 0/.08))
